title: oreosedum pedicellatum
intro: Oreosedum pedicellatum, also known as Goldcrest or Goldilocks Stonecrop, is a succulent perennial plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, to treat wounds, skin irritations, and minor burns. The health benefits of Oreosedum pedicellatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried leaves, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
